name: CORBUS PHAR.HLDGS DL-0001
summary: Corbus Pharmaceuticals Holdings, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing novel therapeutics to treat inflammatory, fibrotic, and metabolic diseases, headquartered in Norwood, Massachusetts. Their pipeline includes drug candidates targeting the endocannabinoid system. Corbus Pharmaceuticals aims to address unmet medical needs.
